subject: [PATCH v8 11/15] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap, called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which is used for tracking read-write protection (RWP) in userfaultfd. The existing PTE bit is reused for both write-protected and RWP-protected pages, but this patch introduces a distinction between the two by scoping each category to its respective VMA type. This change also updates the pagemap_hugetlb_category function to take the VMA into account. As a result, the UAPI no longer conflates write-protected and RWP-protected pages, making it easier to track and manage page access in userfaultfd.
